Variant_1.question_text: Q is 0.360 mol / dm3 sodium carbonate. The equation for the reaction is shown. Na2CO3 + H2SO4 → Na2SO4 + H2O + CO2. Use your result from (a) to calculate the concentration, in mol / dm3, of sulfuric acid in P. Give your answer to three significant figures.
